# 06-Create a file in a repository [POST]

`POST /api/v4/projects/{id}/repository/files/{file_path}`

Creates a file in a specified repository. Use the Commits API to create multiple files with a single request.

### Parameters

| Name | Type | In | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `string` | `path` | Yes | The project ID |
| `file_path` | `string` | `path` | Yes | The URL-encoded path to the file. |

### Request Body (multipart/form-data)

```json
{
  "file": string (required), // The file content to be created (generated by Multipart middleware)
}
```
### Responses

#### 201 - Created

#### 400 - Bad Request

#### 404 - Not Found
